faqs.answer: Cockroach extermination in Annadale typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Annadale residents in most cases. Our team understands that cockroach infestations require urgent attention, and we prioritize rapid response times throughout Staten Island.

faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Annadale homes?
faqs.answer: Annadale properties most commonly experience German cockroach infestations in kitchens and bathrooms, as well as American cockroaches that enter from basements, sewers, and outdoor areas. Our treatments target the specific species identified during inspection.

faqs.question: Are your cockroach treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed and can discuss pet-friendly treatment options during your consultation.
